hint: It's a snack. A classic one.
hostIntro: This next one is a little different. I'm going to say a phrase that sounds like gibberish, and you're going to tell me what it actually means. Say it out loud. Slowly. Anna Mull Crack Errs.
hostCorrect: Animal Crackers! A childhood staple in a little circus box. You clearly had a normal upbringing.
hostWrong: Animal Crackers! You know, those tiny animal-shaped cookies in the circus box? The ones shaped like lions and elephants? Ring any bells?
hostTimeout: Animal Crackers. As in the snack. With the animals. On the box. You're welcome.

hint: You use it every day. Probably right now.
hostIntro: Say this out loud. Really commit to it. Sew Shull May Dee Ah.
hostCorrect: Social Media! The thing that's simultaneously ruining civilization and keeping us all connected. You figured it out.
hostWrong: Social Media! The thing you're probably already thinking about while playing this game. Sew. Shull. May. Dee. Ah.
hostTimeout: Social Media. Which is ironic because you could have posted about this moment on social media instead of sitting here silently.

hostIntro: Close your eyes. Picture a hot summer day. Now repeat after me: Eye Scream.
hostCorrect: Ice cream! The universal solution to a bad day. Brain freeze and all.
hostWrong: Ice Cream! Eye. Scream. I scream, you scream, we all scream for... come on.
hostTimeout: Ice cream. I scream, you scream, nobody answers the question, we all go home sad.

hint: Benjamin Franklin said it was certain.
hostIntro: Two syllables. Two very stressful syllables. Tack Sees.
hostCorrect: Taxes! The one thing you can always count on, whether you want to or not.
hostWrong: Taxes! Tack. Sees. The thing you've been ignoring since April? Yeah, those.
hostTimeout: Taxes. Nobody answered. The IRS noted the irony.

hint: Plato did it. You probably didn't.
hostIntro: Say this out loud and try to keep a straight face. Fill Oss Oh Fee.
hostCorrect: Philosophy! The academic discipline that asks why, how, and whether any of this even matters. You'd fit right in.
hostWrong: Philosophy! Fill. Oss. Oh. Fee. It's what Plato did all day. You could try it.
hostTimeout: Philosophy. The irony of nobody answering a question about the search for knowledge is not lost on me.

hint: It's a hymn. A famous one.
hostIntro: This one might make you want to hum along. Ah May Zing Grace.
hostCorrect: Amazing Grace! A classic hymn that somehow never gets old. Well done, you cultured individual.
hostWrong: Amazing Grace! How sweet the sound. That's the whole first line and you still missed it.
hostTimeout: Amazing Grace. How sweet. The sound. Of nobody answering.

hint: He shoots webs. He's in a lot of movies.
hostIntro: With great gibberish comes great responsibility. Spy Dell Man.
hostCorrect: Spider-Man! Your friendly neighborhood superhero. Spy. Dell. Man. Simple once you hear it.
hostWrong: Spider-Man! The Marvel hero. Not a spy department, not a super man — specifically Spider-Man.
hostTimeout: Spider-Man. He would have answered. He answers everything. Even when he shouldn't.

hostIntro: Say it out loud, try not to howl. Wear Wolves.
hostCorrect: Werewolves! Half human, half wolf, 100% correctly answered. Congrats.
hostWrong: Werewolves! Wear. Wolves. You know, lycanthropes? Full moon? Big teeth? Any of this ringing a bell?
hostTimeout: Werewolves. The irony is that a werewolf would have answered immediately, right in your face.

hint: They're a band. A very good band.
hostIntro: This next gibberish phrase is a band you should know. Ark Tick Munk Ease.
hostCorrect: Arctic Monkeys! Indie rock legends from Sheffield, England. Ark. Tick. Munk. Ease. Nice work.
hostWrong: Arctic Monkeys! The band! With the songs and the guitars! Ark Tick Munk Ease!
hostTimeout: Arctic Monkeys. Their music is great, by the way. You should listen to it instead of sitting here in silence.

hint: It's a dessert. Ice cream involved.
hostIntro: This one's a dessert classic. Baa Nan Ah Split.
hostCorrect: Banana Split! Ice cream, banana, whipped cream, and a cherry on top. A simpler time. A better time.
hostWrong: Banana Split! The ice cream dessert! Baa. Nan. Ah. Split. It was right there.
hostTimeout: Banana Split. No one answered, which means everyone's getting plain vanilla. Metaphorically speaking.

hint: A medical term. Not a fun one.
hostIntro: This one might need a doctor. Sigh Koh Sis.
hostCorrect: Psychosis! A mental health term. Not a fun topic, but you got it right, which is something.
hostWrong: Psychosis! Sigh. Koh. Sis. It's not the fortune-teller version or the superhero sidekick. It's the clinical one.
hostTimeout: Psychosis. The silence in this room right now is genuinely a little unsettling.

hint: Walk of Fame. Big sign on a hill.
hostIntro: Lights, camera, gibberish. Hole Ee Wood.
hostCorrect: Hollywood! The entertainment capital of the world. Also a neighborhood in LA where everyone is either in a movie or waiting to be in a movie.
hostWrong: Hollywood! Hole. Ee. Wood. The place with the sign. And the stars. And the overpriced coffee.
hostTimeout: Hollywood. Where dreams go to either come true or sit in a writers' room for twenty years.
